definition: A traditional system of knowledge developed in South Asia; this demo uses only a narrow educational subset.
An Ayurvedic organizing concept commonly discussed through Vata, Pitta, and Kapha; not a diagnosis in this app.
A concept commonly associated with qualities such as movement, lightness, dryness, coolness, and variability.
A concept commonly associated with qualities such as warmth, sharpness, intensity, and transformation.
A concept commonly associated with qualities such as steadiness, heaviness, coolness, smoothness, and stability.
Longer-term self-reported tendencies across adult life when generally well; kept separate from recent experience.
Self-reported experience during a recent time window, currently the past seven days.
A provisional product measure of submitted and substantive answers; it is not diagnostic or clinical confidence.
